error_signature: could not extend file because project size limit (512 MB) has been exceeded
title: Project size limit exceeded in n8n Docker setup
symptom: The user encounters an error stating that the project size limit of 512 MB has been exceeded, despite having only four workflows.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker environment
not_this_if: Using a different database or setup without size limits
root_cause: The error occurs because the default maximum payload size for n8n workflows is set to 512 MB. This limit can be reached if the workflows contain large amounts of data or binary files, causing the system to reject further extensions.
fix_steps: Open your Docker Compose file for n8n
Change the value of N8N_PAYLOAD_SIZE_MAX to 1GB
Restart the n8n Docker container to apply changes
agent_instruction: Update the N8N_PAYLOAD_SIZE_MAX environment variable to 1GB in your Docker setup.
